retrieved_result: Q: change the decimal point to a comma. GO gogopoppykk asked on September 15, 2010 Q: change the decimal point to a comma Hi there, I would like to format my numbers using a comma instead of a period for the decimal place. I don't think custom formats allow me to do this. I might be wrong and I don't want to just use Find and Replace as it
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses numeric formatting with a comma as the decimal separator, which is unrelated to Docker setup for beginners.
